ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drug_pairs" (
  "drug_pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug pair */,
  "drug1" TEXT /* Name of the first drug in the pair */,
  "drug2" TEXT /* Name of the second drug in the pair */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction between the drugs (e.g., synergy, additivity, antagonism) */,
  "interaction_strength" REAL /* Strength of the interaction on a scale */,
  "interaction_mechanism" TEXT /* Mechanism of interaction */,
  "therapeutic_application" TEXT /* Potential therapeutic applications of the drug pair */,
  "toxicity_risk" REAL /* Risk of toxicity associated with the drug pair */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the drug pair record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the drug pair record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_pairs_drug1 FOREIGN KEY ("drug1") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_pairs_drug2 FOREIGN KEY ("drug2") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "drugs" (
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug */,
  "chemical_properties" TEXT /* Chemical properties of the drug */,
  "drug_class" TEXT /* Classification of the drug (e.g., antibiotic, antiviral) */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the drug */,
  "pka" REAL /* Acid dissociation constant */,
  "logP" REAL /* Octanol-water partition coefficient */,
  "solubility" TEXT /* Solubility of the drug */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Common side effects of the drug */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the drug record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the drug record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type (e.g., synergy, additivity, antagonism) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction type */,
  "interaction_strength" REAL /* Strength of the interaction on a scale */,
  "mechanism_of_action" TEXT /* Detailed mechanism of action of the interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cellular_processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cellular process */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the cellular process (e.g., cell wall, protein synthesis) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cellular process */,
  "process_category" TEXT /* Category of the cellular process (e.g., metabolic, signaling) */,
  "related_pathways" TEXT /* Pathways related to the cellular process */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cellular process record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cellular process record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_pair_effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effect */,
  "drug_pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug pair that produces the effect */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cellular process affected by the drug pair */,
  "effect_type" TEXT /* Type of effect (e.g., synergy, additivity, antagonism) */,
  "effect_strength" REAL /* Strength of the effect on a scale */,
  "effect_mechanism" TEXT /* Detailed mechanism of the effect */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the effect record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the effect record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_pair_effects_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES cellular_processes ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_pair_effects_drug_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_pair_id") REFERENCES drug_pairs ("drug_pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the data file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of data file (e.g., CSV, Excel, JSON) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file on the server */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "analysis_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., regression, clustering) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the analysis */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis that produced the result */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the result */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the result */,
  "result_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result that produced the prediction */,
  "prediction_name" TEXT /* Name of the prediction */,
  "prediction_value" REAL /* Value of the prediction */,
  "prediction_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the prediction */,
  "prediction_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)
